series_metadata.series_description: Record Series consists of the following: Yellow copies of forms BMV- 5609 and BMV- 5702,data reports,and salvage/credit documents(e.g.,memos,lists,DAS forms,etc.).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 4 years with salvage/credit documents being retained in the Distribution Services Section''s office file, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in MS excel for 4 years or until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
